excerpt: A customer portal is a secure online platform where your customers can log in and manage their rentals. Through a customer portal, customers usually can: View active and past rental orders; Review, download, and pay invoices; Request call-offs or extensions; Update billing or contact information.
Give your customers the tools to reserve, extend, and manage rentals all without coming into the branch. Oh, and the platform automatically creates contracts too.

For rental equipment, many of these tools allow contractors to see, in one place, all of their equipment out in the field; the location of each piece of machinery; payment terms; and the date each item is due back at the supplier. The better systems even offer one-click call offs (calling rented equipment off on time is an area of huge potential savings), as well as alerts and inventory summaries.

Customer Portal is a customizable, online platform for RentalMan that helps your equipment rental customers access information on their accounts, rented equipment, contracts, quotes, reservations, and invoices 24/7/365. It also provides a fast, secure online space to make payments. Pickup requests, quote processing, and field service requests are all managed in the portal as well.

Empower customers to browse and rent equipment, schedule pickups or maintenance, access account history, view invoices, manage contracts, and more. Accelerate the sales cycle by offering precise equipment information and pricing online. Enable customers to make reservations independently, supported by automated email responses.
